technical_replicate: All in vitro and in vivo experiments were performed in two to four technical replicates.
experimental_design: Pseudomonas aeruginosa and LPS treatment in murine model
The goal of this study was to assess the role of TRAP5 in immune cell recruitment during lung infection.
factor_value: Trap5-/- and wild-type control mice received intratracheal administration of P.aerugniosa (Xen41) or LPS.
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: n =4 mice per group and n ≥ 5 to 7 mice per group
number_of_samples: The total number of biological samples can be inferred from the number of biological replicates.
